displayTitle: Last Call At The Zero Angle
synopsis:
"Last Call at the Zero Angle" is a short story written by Jason Fry that was published in Star Wars Insider 156. The story focuses on a squadron of TIE fighter pilots.
It has also been collected in "Star Wars Insider Fiction Collection Vol. 2"
https://www.youtini.com/book/star-wars-insider-fiction-collection-volume-2
title: Last Call At The Zero Angle
